extracts.extract: Think about the end product when choosing the best tools to get there.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Choosing tools based on the desired end product is an enduring workflow design principle

extracts.extract: Use Caution: Doublecheck your results. Lat/Lng may be wrong. Check the precision field.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Verifying geocoding results and checking precision fields is an enduring data quality practice

extracts.extract: Tips to help avoid mistakes: Try to prove yourself wrong. Run it by your targets. Ask an expert (in the newsroom or not). Make sure you're using the right test.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Trying to prove yourself wrong, consulting experts, and using correct statistical tests are enduring verification principles

extracts.extract: Stop doing stuff by hand. Automate it. Create a pipeline from start to finish.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Automating processes and creating end-to-end pipelines is an enduring best practice now even more accessible via LLMs

extracts.extract: Can't automate decisions, can automate processes. Always work on a copy. Unit test when you are making a novel assertion. You are responsible for the code you write.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Decisions vs processes distinction and unit testing novel assertions endure, but accountability for code now extends to LLM-generated code

extracts.extract: Is the data good? Define good. Boxplots compare individual to aggregate. Step 0: Plot the data. All models are wrong, but some are useful.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Plotting data first, defining what good means, and the Box aphorism about models are enduring analytical wisdom

extracts.extract: Collect everything. You can't know it disappeared if you didn't know it was there in the first place.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Collecting everything to detect future disappearances is an enduring data preservation and accountability principle

extracts.extract: Define — write a headline for the project and display it. Brainstorm — no idea is bad. Wireframe/prototype — sanity check. Refine and perfect — start small and work up, not the other way around. Deliver.
extracts.relevance_rationale: The design process of define-brainstorm-wireframe-refine-deliver is an enduring presentation workflow

extracts.extract: Do a rolling investigation: get (and show) some data, explain the data, engage with the community, repeat.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Rolling investigations with iterative community engagement are an enduring audience engagement strategy

extracts.extract: Check out the subject definitions file. It might not mean what you think it means. Check out the universe. It might not be counting who you think it's counting.
extracts.chapter: Census I: Must-have data for every beat
extracts.relevance_rationale: Checking data definitions and understanding what a dataset actually counts are enduring data literacy principles
